text: I feel a sense of curiosity and wonder standing before this R+D exhibition. The vibrant colors and the interplay of research and technology displayed here ignite a spark in me, prompting questions about the boundaries of human knowledge and innovation. The text about perception and clarity resonates—how easily our reality can blur, just as my mind races to catch up with the rapid pace of development around me. It’s exhilarating but also a little overwhelming.
